verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am the LORD that healeth thee, I am the LORD that healeth thee; Jehovah Rapha is My Name: For I am the LORD that healeth thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am the LORD that healeth thee, I am the LORD that healeth thee; Sickness must flee at My command: For I am the LORD that healeth thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am the LORD that healeth thee, I am the LORD that healeth thee; The prayer of faith shall banish disease: For I am the LORD that healeth thee.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am the LORD that healeth thee, I am the LORD that healeth thee; My name is still as ointment poured forth: For I am the LORD that healeth thee.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I am the LORD that healeth thee, I am the LORD that healeth thee; Come and be free from all your pains: For I am the LORD that healeth thee.
